cases.title: System marks CheckedIn registration Attended when event completes
preconditions: Event progressed to InProgress with participant registration in CheckedIn state
Valid CheckinRecord exists for the registration
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin authorized to complete the event
steps: Invoke eventService.complete(eventId, organizerContext)
Query registration row by registrationId
cases.expected: Registration state transitions from CheckedIn to Attended; event state is Completed; CheckinRecord remains unchanged per BR-12 attendance inference

cases.title: System marks Registered participant without valid check-in Absent when event completes
preconditions: Event InProgress with at least one Registered participant who never checked in
No CheckinRecord exists for that registration
OrganizerAdmin authorized to complete the event
steps: Invoke eventService.complete(eventId, organizerContext)
Query registration state for the non-checked-in participant
cases.expected: Registration transitions from Registered to Absent per state machine eventCompletedWithoutCheckin guard; FR-17 Absent outcome is applied automatically at completion

cases.title: POST complete finalizes Attended and Absent states across registrations list
preconditions: E2E fixture event InProgress with one CheckedIn and one Registered-without-check-in participant
Organizer admin JWT with event scope
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete with organizer Authorization bearer token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20
cases.expected: Checked-in registration appears with state Attended; non-checked-in Registered registration appears with state Absent; no registration remains CheckedIn or Registered

cases.title: markAttendance transition guard targets Attended only when event is complete
preconditions: Registration state machine guard for markAttendance transition
Registration in CheckedIn state
Event context in Completed state
steps: Evaluate markAttendance guard with CheckedIn registration and Completed event
Evaluate same guard with event still InProgress
cases.expected: Guard permits CheckedIn to Attended when event is Completed; guard rejects or defers transition while event remains InProgress

cases.title: eventCompletedWithoutCheckin guard targets Absent for Registered without valid check-in
preconditions: Registration state machine guard for eventCompletedWithoutCheckin transition
Registration in Registered state with no CheckinRecord
Event completion trigger active
steps: Evaluate eventCompletedWithoutCheckin guard for Registered registration without check-in
Evaluate same guard for CheckedIn registration with valid check-in
cases.expected: Guard permits Registered to Absent when event completes without check-in; CheckedIn registration is not routed to Absent via this guard

cases.title: Self check-in participant receives Attended status after event completion
preconditions: Event with self check-in enabled; participant completed self check-in (CheckedIn)
Event InProgress ready for completion
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete with organizer token
GET /api/v1/me/registrations for the participant
cases.expected: Participant registration shows Attended after completion regardless of staff vs self check-in method; FR-17 applies uniformly to all valid check-in holders

cases.title: Event dashboard reflects Attended and Absent counts after completion
preconditions: Event completed with mixed cohort: some CheckedIn, some Registered without check-in
OrganizerAdmin JWT authorized for dashboard
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard after event completion
Cross-reference attended and absent counts with registrations filtered by terminal states
cases.expected: Dashboard attendance summary matches count of Attended and Absent registrations post-completion per FR-22 operational overview

cases.title: Organizer registrations view displays Attended and Absent after event completion
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin logged in with event scope
Event completed with at least one Attended and one Absent participant
Organizer registrations or attendance management page available
steps: Navigate to organizer event registrations list for the completed event
Locate checked-in participant row and non-checked-in participant row
cases.expected: UI shows Attended badge for checked-in participant and Absent badge for participant without valid check-in; no intermediate CheckedIn or Registered states remain visible

cases.title: Participant my registrations shows Attended or Absent terminal state after completion
preconditions: Participant logged in with registration on a completed event
Participant either checked in (expect Attended) or did not check in while Registered (expect Absent)
steps: Navigate to participant my registrations list
Find the completed event registration row
cases.expected: Registration row displays Attended when participant had valid check-in, or Absent when registered but never checked in; state reflects post-completion system update

cases.title: Mixed cohort receives correct Attended and Absent assignments in single completion
preconditions: Single event with multiple Registered participants
Subset checked in within window; remainder never checked in
No waitlisted or cancelled registrations in test cohort
steps: Complete event via eventService.complete
List all registrations and group by terminal attendance state
cases.expected: Every CheckedIn registration becomes Attended; every Registered-without-check-in becomes Absent; no registration remains CheckedIn or Registered after completion

cases.title: Attendance status is not updated before event completion trigger
preconditions: Event InProgress with participant in CheckedIn state
Another participant in Registered state without check-in
steps: Query both registration states while event remains InProgress
Attempt any direct markAttendance or Absent transition outside completion workflow if exposed
cases.expected: CheckedIn registration remains CheckedIn; Registered-without-check-in remains Registered until event completion; FR-17 update occurs only after completion

cases.title: Waitlisted registration is not assigned Attended or Absent on completion
preconditions: Event at capacity with waitlist enabled
Participant registration in Waitlisted state (never promoted to Registered)
Event progressed through InProgress to completion
steps: Complete event
Query waitlisted participant registration state
cases.expected: Waitlisted registration does not transition to Attended or Absent; terminal state follows waitlist/expiry policy (e.g. Expired), outside FR-17 attendance inference scope

cases.title: Cancelled registration is excluded from Attended or Absent finalization
preconditions: Participant cancelled registration (CancelledByUser) before check-in
Another participant checked in for contrast
Event completes normally
steps: Complete event
Query cancelled registration state alongside attended participant
cases.expected: Cancelled registration remains in cancelled terminal state; only active CheckedIn and Registered-without-check-in registrations receive Attended or Absent per BR-12

cases.title: Repeated POST complete does not corrupt Attended or Absent terminal states
preconditions: Event already Completed with registrations in Attended and Absent states
Organizer admin JWT
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/complete again or verify second completion attempt
GET registration states for attended and absent participants
cases.expected: Attended and Absent states remain unchanged; invalid re-completion returns 409 or equivalent without duplicate attendance side effects

cases.title: Concurrent event completion attempts produce consistent attendance outcomes
preconditions: Event InProgress with CheckedIn and Registered-without-check-in participants
Two concurrent complete requests from authorized OrganizerAdmin actors
steps: Launch two parallel eventService.complete calls for the same eventId
Query all registration terminal states after both requests settle
cases.expected: Exactly one completion succeeds; all registrations have consistent Attended/Absent terminal states with no partial or duplicate transitions

cases.title: Attendance finalization commits atomically with event completion
preconditions: Multiple CheckedIn and Registered-without-check-in participants on same event
Database transaction boundary for event completion and attendance reconciliation per module breakdown
steps: Complete event in single operation
Query event state and all affected registration states in same database session
cases.expected: Event is Completed and every eligible registration has terminal Attended or Absent state; no partial finalization where event is Completed but some CheckedIn rows remain un-finalized

cases.title: Attendance status assignment is deterministic for identical fixtures
preconditions: Fixed clock and seeded fixture IDs per testing plan deterministic controls
Same CheckedIn and Registered cohort across repeated test runs
steps: Run event completion and attendance finalization scenario twice with identical inputs
Compare registration terminal states across both runs
cases.expected: Both runs produce identical Attended/Absent assignments with no flakiness from ordering or timing

cases.title: CheckedIn to Attended and Registered to Absent transitions are recorded in status history
preconditions: Event with CheckedIn and Registered-without-check-in participants
Status history endpoint enabled for the event
steps: Complete event
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/status-history?registrationId={registrationId} for attended and absent participants
cases.expected: History includes CheckedIn to Attended and Registered to Absent transitions with timestamps and event-completion trigger context per FR-23 traceability

cases.title: Attended status from completion satisfies downstream certificate eligibility attendance rule
preconditions: Event completed with checked-in participant marked Attended
Eligibility evaluation available post-completion
steps: Confirm registration state is Attended after completion
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility/me for the attended participant
cases.expected: Eligibility evaluation does not fail attendance rule solely due to missing Attended status; Absent participant fails BR-17 minimum attendance condition

cases.title: Paginated attendance list reflects final Attended participants after completion
preconditions: Event completed after in-window check-ins for multiple participants
OrganizerStaff JWT with attendance read scope
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance?page=1&pageSize=20 after completion
Cross-reference rows with registrations filtered by state=Attended
cases.expected: Attendance list preserves checkinAt for checked-in participants; corresponding registrations show Attended in paginated endpoint with valid total and totalPages metadata
